summary: Recent updates to Firefox's Media Capabilities have made it necessary to temporarily reject the WebRTC (the technology behind video calls) scalabilityMode feature until further developments are made regarding Bug 1571470. This change ensures that the browser maintains stability and performance while improvements to the scalability of video streams are being worked on. **This matters because it helps prevent potential issues for users relying on WebRTC for high-quality communication**, ensuring a smoother experience in their online interactions.
